title: tabviz wire-format spec (generated at 1.10)
description: GENERATED — do not edit. Top-level shape from src/spec/v1.0.json; per-column-type definitions from SCHEMA_REGISTRY. Regenerate: bun run scripts/generate-json-schema.ts

specVersion.description: Semver-shaped version string. Major must be `1` for this schema; minor is additive (older readers ignore unknown fields).

anyOf.description: Forward-compatible fallback: column types UNKNOWN to this schema version remain valid (additive minors). Known types must satisfy their definition.

type.description: Discriminator. R currently emits 'split_table'; the TS type calls it 'split_forest'. This mismatch is on the synchronization-audit list (spec §2.5-G6) and will be reconciled in a future minor.
